rows.label: qev050301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good sir... I would like to ask you something.
Do you believe there is anything in this world
worth protecting even at the cost of your life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Depending on how you think about it, no matter how
noble the action, it is meaningless if you lose your
life... I feel like that is one way to look at things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Answer that there are things more
important than your own life.

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Answer that life is the
most important thing.

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0003
rows.name:
So even aliens feel that way...
Does that mean Ge Jewhe's choice
was not wrong after all...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0004
rows.name:
That is a response unique to an alien.
But... I feel that such a way of
thinking is perfectly fine as well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I sometimes think... Ge Jewhe could stand
to value her own life a little more...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0006
rows.name:
...I have a friend, a brave
female warrior named Ge Jewhe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Having no relatives, we have shared our meager
meals and weathered the storms together since
childhood, holding each other's hands to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Now that we have slipped away from the Growth, I
thought we could live peacefully together again,
however poor we might be, just like the old days...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0009
rows.name:
She... She returned to the Black Steel
Continent alone to strike a blow against
the Growth who insulted Ga Derg-sama.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask if no one tried to stop
her reckless actions.

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0040
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0041
rows.name: Praise her brave resolve.

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0010
rows.name:
The doubts held by a thoughtful person like you... are entirely
reasonable. Standing alone against the Growth, who have destroyed
countless stars, will only end in a meaningless death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0011
rows.name:
However, because Larsians value pride above all else,
we are a people who sometimes consider it acceptable
to throw our lives away for the sake of loyalty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even when she announced her resolve to everyone,
though some tried to stop her, ultimately, they
respected her will and saw her off to her death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0013
rows.name:
You are a proud warrior,
much like the Lars...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Even when she announced her resolve to everyone,
many of our comrades, just like you, praised
her will and saw her off to her death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0015
rows.name:
But I... I don't want her to die. I don't want
to lose Jewhe, who always held my hand and
protected me like a father, like a brother...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Even if it goes against her proud
will... I... I want her to live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0017
rows.name:
Excuse me... You appear to be
a highly skilled warrior.
Please, could you save her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0018
rows.name:
I beg of you! If there is anything I can
pay, I will offer my very life in
exchange... So please, save her life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Truly, thank you so much... She should be wearing
a silver bracelet on her right arm, engraved with
the words, "Let us share this life together"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Even if she has become a lifeless husk,
you should be able to identify her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0021
rows.name:
If—if it should come to that,
please, at the very least, bring
back her favorite dagger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I humbly ask for your assistance. First,
please search for the Doll she rode out in,
as a starting point for your investigation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Before coming to Mira, I was a
jeweler... The silver bracelet
Jewhe wears is one that I made.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0024
rows.name:
I made two identical ones, and I wear
mine constantly, as you can see. It
is truly a symbol of our bond...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0025
rows.name:
—Please, look out for Jewhe. First, please
search for the Doll she rode out in, as a
starting point for your investigation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0026
rows.name:
I believe Jewhe headed to the Black
Steel Continent with firm resolve.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0027
rows.name:
She might not agree to
return easily, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Even so... please, by any means necessary,
save her life... I beg of you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Ah...! That brave face, that sweet
scent, that blunt way of speaking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Jewhe has returned! And it is
all thanks to you, [ST:playername ]-sama![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0031
rows.name:
It may be too little as
gratitude for saving Jewhe's
life, but please, accept this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0032
rows.name:
I... as a Larsian woman, had only ever
watched over Jewhe's reckless actions until
now, never once trying to condemn them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0033
rows.name:
But through this incident, I've realized
something. I cannot live if I lose
Jewhe. Jewhe is... precious to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hey... Sezha! What are you saying?! If
you say things like that, I... I'll be
too embarrassed to look you in the face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0035
rows.name:
Jewhe! From now on, I will speak my mind. If
you do something this reckless again... I
will stop you, even if I must risk my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0036
rows.name:
This love is far more important than
any Larsian code. ...Don't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0051
rows.name: Empathize and agree with her.

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0061
rows.name:
React coldly, stating that love
does not resolve everything.

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0037
rows.name:
You are a deeply compassionate
person... I am so glad I
entrusted this request to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Spoken like someone who walks the path of the
warrior. It must be thanks to that calm judgment
that Jewhe was able to return alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0039
rows.name:
From now on, just as sworn on these silver
bracelets, the two of us will remain
together, no matter where we may be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thank you so much, [ST:playername ]-sama... I will
never forget this debt of gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0041
rows.name:
I am sorry for losing my composure over
the comms earlier... I am alright now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Jewhe was a warrior through and through, after
all... I had braced myself for the possibility
that something like this might happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0043
rows.name:
I must now mourn Jewhe...
Please hand me her dagger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0044
rows.name:
...If I use this dagger to
follow after Jewhe, I will be
able to see her once more...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0070
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0071
rows.name: Yell at her not to give in to despair.

rows.label: qev050301_JNK0080
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev050301_SEL0081
rows.name: Offer gentle words to comfort her.

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0045
rows.name:
The way you get angry... It reminds
me somewhat of Jewhe. The tone is
harsh, but there is warmth behind it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0046
rows.name:
That warmth you possess... It
somehow reminds me of Jewhe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0047
rows.name:
Jewhe met an end she need not be
ashamed of as a Larsian warrior...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0048
rows.name:
To follow after her... would only
serve to desecrate Jewhe's memory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050301_MSG0049
rows.name: ...Thank you for everything.[ST:wait ]
